settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your store configuration, regions, payments, and admin accounts.

salesChannels.title: Sales Channels
salesChannels.description: Sales channels represent different storefronts or platforms where you sell products.
salesChannels.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this sales channel? Products will no longer be available through it.
salesChannels.name: Name

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Manage publishable API keys for your storefront and integrations.
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? Any applications using it will lose access immediately.

shipping.title: Shipping Options
shipping.description: View configured shipping options. Shipping options are managed through fulfillment providers and regions.
shipping.noOptions: No shipping options configured. Shipping options are created when you set up fulfillment providers for your regions.

payment.title: Payment Providers
payment.description: View configured payment providers. Payment providers handle payment processing for your store.
payment.noProviders: No payment providers configured. Add payment provider modules in your Medusa configuration.

paymentConfig.title: Payment Configuration
paymentConfig.description: Manage the enabled status and configuration of each payment method.
paymentConfig.stripeEnvNote: Stripe API key is configured via the STRIPE_API_KEY environment variable. No configuration needed here.
paymentConfig.wooshpayConfigNote: Use the same webhook signing secret configured in WooshPay. Sandbox mode must match the API key type. Enable this method to show it at checkout.

pickupLocations.title: Pickup Locations
pickupLocations.description: Manage the global pickup locations shown at checkout when a customer selects pickup.
pickupLocations.createDescription: Add a pickup point customers can see at checkout.
pickupLocations.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.

form.name: Name
form.notePlaceholder: Optional pickup instructions; images are supported

regionSettings.title: Sales Regions
regionSettings.description: Manage the regions where your store operates. Each region defines a currency and applicable countries.
regionSettings.noRegions: No regions configured yet. Add your first region to start selling.
regionSettings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this region? This action cannot be undone.
regionSettings.name: Name
regionSettings.noAvailableProviders: No payment providers available. Please add a payment provider module in Medusa config.

users.title: Admin Accounts
users.description: Create and manage admin accounts that can sign in to the dashboard.
users.myAccountDescription: View your login identity and update your personal profile.
users.securityDescription: Change your password from a separate form. You will need to sign in again after it changes.
users.changePasswordDescription: Enter your current password and set a new password for this account.
users.createDescription: The new account can sign in with its email and password immediately.
users.editDescription: You can edit profile names. Email login identity is not editable in this release.
users.passwordHint: Password must be at least 10 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
users.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters.
users.passwordNoEdgeSpaces: Password cannot start or end with spaces.
users.passwordRequirements: Password must include uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
users.passwordMustChange: New password must be different from the current password.
